## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Define what "done" looks like -->

## Architecture Impact Analysis

**Components Affected:**

- [ ] Frontend/UI
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Database schema
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization
- [ ] Third-party integrations
- [ ] Infrastructure/DevOps
- [ ] Mobile applications

**Technical Considerations:**

- **Data Changes:** <!-- New entities, schema modifications -->
- **API Changes:** <!-- New endpoints, modifications -->
- **Performance Impact:** <!-- Expected load, scalability concerns -->
- **Security Implications:** <!-- Auth, data privacy, compliance -->
- **Dependencies:** <!-- External services, libraries -->

**Integration Points:**
<!-- How does this feature interact with existing systems? -->

## Definition of Ready

<!-- Checklist for when this feature is ready for development -->
- [ ] Business value clearly defined
- [ ] Acceptance criteria specified
- [ ] Architecture impact assessed
- [ ] Technical dependencies identified
- [ ] UI/UX mockups available (if applicable)
- [ ] Performance requirements defined
- [ ] Security requirements reviewed

## Additional Context

**Priority Level:**

- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (important for upcoming release)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

**Estimated Complexity:**

- [ ] Small (1-2 sprints)
- [ ] Medium (3-5 sprints)
- [ ] Large (6+ sprints, consider epic)

**Supporting Materials:**
<!-- Links to designs, research, related issues -->
